sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27244" key="dioptri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διοπτρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n27244.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">use the speculum,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:75" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.75</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
